Event: Royal Challenge - Season 26
Event Date: 01/06/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI108
Burning Stone Ring

Once in a while, deals 150000 magic damage to 2 random enemies and sets them on fire. The burning enemies take 225000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 5 sec. A field of fire spreads around the burning units, and all enemies in a small radius around them take 50000 magic damage every second. If an enemy takes damage from two fields of fire at once, that enemy additionally takes 150000 pure damage every second.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
